'''√h-zh-r''' ('''kahazhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cultimulch|cultimulch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cultimulch|cultimulch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihazhar || jihazhar || shihazhar || kihazhar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhazhar || jujuhazhar || shushuhazhar || kukuhazhar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhazhar || juhazhar || shuhazhar || kuhazhar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhazhar || juhazhar || shuhazhar || kuhazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehazhar || jehazhar || shehazhar || kehazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohazhar || jojohazhar || shoshohazhar || kokohazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohazhar || johazhar || shohazhar || kohazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohazhar || johazhar || shohazhar || kohazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar || hazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhazhar || jæhazhar || shæhazhar || kæhazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahazhar || jajahazhar || shashahazhar || kakahazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahazhar || jahazhar || shahazhar || kahazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahazhar || jahazhar || shahazhar || kahazhar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahazhar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahazhar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahazhar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahazharnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahazharnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahazharnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahazharshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahazharnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahazharshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahazharro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahazharnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahazharro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahazharmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahazharnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahazharmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahazharsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahazharnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahazharsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahazharng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahazharnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahazharng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahazharya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahazharnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahazharya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahazharyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahazharnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahazharyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahazharnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahazharnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahazharnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahazharnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahazharnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahazharnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahazharnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahazharnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahazharnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahazharshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahazharnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahazharshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahazharshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahazharnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahazharshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahazharshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahazharnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahazharshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahazharronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahazharnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahazharronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahazharroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahazharnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahazharroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahazharromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahazharnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahazharromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahazharmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahazharnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahazharmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahazharmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahazharnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahazharmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahazharmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahazharnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahazharmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
